description: Rule-Based Alerting Engine — rules matched to data_access_logs.csv + user_profiles.csv schema

rules.name: After Hours Restricted Access
rules.description: Access to high-sensitivity resources outside business hours.

exceptions.reason: IT staff may work outside business hours for maintenance
Admins may need off-hours access for critical operations

rules.name: Bulk Export on High-Sensitivity Resource
rules.description: Any export_data action targeting a high-sensitivity resource is a data exfiltration risk.

exceptions.reason: Finance exports GL data as part of regular reporting
Finance performs end-of-week GL exports every Friday
Admins may perform authorized data exports

rules.name: Admin Operation by Non-Privileged User
rules.description: A user with privilege_level 'user' performing admin_operation is a serious anomaly.

rules.name: Service Account Performing Interactive Action
rules.description: Service accounts should never login, export data, or access files interactively.

rules.name: Access to Out-of-Scope System
rules.description: User accesses a resource that does not map to any system in their systems_access list.

exceptions.reason: Admins have broad system access by default

rules.name: Failed Action on High-Sensitivity Resource
rules.description: A failed access attempt on a high-sensitivity resource may indicate probing or unauthorized access attempts.

rules.name: Admin Console Access by Non-Admin
rules.description: Admin_Console is a high-sensitivity resource. Access by non-admin, non-power-user roles should be flagged.

exceptions.reason: IT staff may access Admin_Console for routine support tasks

rules.name: SIEM Access by Non-Security Department
rules.description: SIEM is a security monitoring tool. Access by non-Security, non-IT, non-Compliance departments is anomalous.

exceptions.reason: Admins may access SIEM for cross-functional monitoring

rules.name: PROD_DB Access by Non-Technical Department
rules.description: Direct PROD_DB access by Marketing, HR, Legal, or Sales is out of scope and potentially dangerous.

exceptions.reason: Admins in any department may need PROD_DB access

rules.name: HRIS Access by Non-HR Department
rules.description: HRIS contains sensitive employee PII. Access by non-HR, non-Executive, non-Compliance departments should be reviewed.

exceptions.reason: Admins may access HRIS for provisioning tasks

rules.name: High-Sensitivity Access During Weekend
rules.description: Any access to a high-sensitivity resource on weekends warrants review.

exceptions.reason: Security team monitors systems 24/7 including weekends
IT may perform weekend maintenance on sensitive systems
Admins may handle critical weekend operations

rules.name: Export on Customer Vault by Non-Sales/Non-Marketing
rules.description: Customer_Vault holds customer PII. Exporting from it outside Sales/Marketing/Executive is suspicious.
rules.condition: action == 'export_data' and resource == 'Customer_Vault' and department not in ['Sales', 'Marketing', 'Executive']

exceptions.reason: Admins may export for approved data migrations

global_exceptions.reason: Any access by an inactive account escalates all matched rules to critical
